specific_location: Golden Ponds Park and Nature Area
description: Large all-white wader with red facial skin, long red decurved bill, red legs, pale bluish eyes, and black distal ends of outer primaries (seen in flight). Adult, based on plumage. First seen from coordinates 40.1713348, -105.1412201, flying from the western shoreline of Pond #2 to the northern shoreline of the southern island in Pond #2 at Golden Ponds Park and Nature Area. First photographed at 6:04 a.m., feeding by probing along the southern island's northern edge. No calls given. Jamie Simo and I were conducting a monthly point count bird survey together at Golden Ponds for the City of Longmont and we found and identified the White Ibis simultaneously.
photographer: Photographer: Sarah Spotten, Sarah Spotten, Sarah Spotten, Sarah Spotten, Sarah Spotten
